questions.q: What was the central cause of the Civil War?
questions.explanation: The war was fought chiefly over slavery and whether it would expand or end.

questions.q: What did the Emancipation Proclamation (1863) declare?
options: That enslaved people in the Confederate states were free
questions.explanation: Lincoln's order turned the war into a fight for freedom as well as union.

options: Citizenship and equal protection of the laws
questions.explanation: It granted citizenship to all born in the U.S. and promised equal protection.

options: The effort after the war to rebuild the South and protect the rights of freed people
